'''鈭歴h-ng-zh-zh''' ('''kashangzhezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:challange|challange]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-ng-zh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:challange|challange]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-ng-zh-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kashangzhezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishangzhezhoko|thishangzhezhoko]] || [[word:jishangzhezhoko|jishangzhezhoko]] || [[word:shishangzhezhoko|shishangzhezhoko]] || [[word:kishangzhezhoko|kishangzhezhoko]]
